mapper.select: select position_id as POSITION_ID, position_name as POSITION_NAME, hierarchy_level as HIERARCHY_LEVEL, weight_base as WEIGHT_BASE, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from positions_51 where position_id = #{positionId} and is_deleted = 'n'

select position_id as POSITION_ID, position_name as POSITION_NAME, hierarchy_level as HIERARCHY_LEVEL, weight_base as WEIGHT_BASE, is_deleted as IS_DELETED, version as VERSION, created_at as CREATED_AT, created_by as CREATED_BY, updated_at as UPDATED_AT, updated_by as UPDATED_BY from positions_51 where is_deleted = 'n' order by hierarchy_level asc, position_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into positions_51 ( position_name, hierarchy_level, weight_base, is_deleted, version, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{positionName}, #{hierarchyLevel}, #{weightBase}, #{isDeleted}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy} )
